query:
-- Verificar blocos, macros, micros
SELECT 'blocos' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM blocos
UNION ALL
SELECT 'macros', COUNT(*) FROM macros
UNION ALL
SELECT 'micros', COUNT(*) FROM micros
UNION ALL
-- Verificar se existem dados em competencias_blocos, competencias_macros, competencias_micros
SELECT 'competencias_blocos', COUNT(*) FROM competencias_blocos
UNION ALL
SELECT 'competencias_macros', COUNT(*) FROM competencias_macros
UNION ALL
SELECT 'competencias_micros', COUNT(*) FROM competencias_micros;
